stemHtml: A jet transport aeroplane is landing at an airport situated close to a noise-sensitive area during the hours that the NAP (Noise Abatement Procedures) are in force. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: Noise abatement procedures shall not be a limiting factor in regards to safety.
options.b: Use of reverse thrust is prohibited under all circumstances, as noise abatement procedures are in force.
options.d: Use of reverse thrust is only allowed if ATC grant permission.
